---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, incorrect, or missing documentation
title: "[docs] "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

**Document affected**
<!-- File path or URL. Examples: README.md, USER-MANUAL.md section 4, docs/index.html -->

**Issue**
<!-- What is wrong, missing, or confusing? Quote the affected text if possible. -->

**Suggested fix**
<!-- Proposed wording, structure change, or new section. -->

**Audience this affects**
- [ ] End-user / municipal staff
- [ ] IT / system administrator
- [ ] Developer / contributor
- [ ] Evaluator (deciding whether to adopt)
